05-ljubljana.rationale: Two eastern tile columns are locked; one full column prevents direct adjacency leakage.

08-kamnik.rationale: Eastern column is locked; one full column separates the Savinja engineering pilot.

01-koper.rationale: Coastal SLR is a separate mechanism; Koper does not select the riverine replacement.

low_flat_q100_negative.rule: inside validity, outside Q100 and ambiguity buffer, norm_elev <= 0.35, norm_slope <= 0.25
low_flat_q100_negative.purpose: Detect the D19 low-flat basin shortcut.

low_hand_q100_negative.rule: inside validity, outside Q100 and ambiguity buffer, norm_hand <= 0.20
low_hand_q100_negative.purpose: Detect false positives at low per-tile HAND endpoints or disconnected terrain.

flat_upland_q100_negative.rule: inside validity, outside Q100 and ambiguity buffer, norm_elev >= 0.65, norm_slope <= 0.25
flat_upland_q100_negative.purpose: Check whether flatness alone triggers the model away from the basin floor.

terrace_like_q100_negative.rule: inside validity, outside Q100 and ambiguity buffer, 0.20 < norm_hand <= 0.45, norm_slope <= 0.35
terrace_like_q100_negative.purpose: Approximate elevated/channel-adjacent terrace controls until mapped landform controls exist.

selection_policy.guard_data: excluded from fitting and final metrics
selection_policy.locked_test_data: baseline reporting now; replacement model access only at final selection gate
selection_policy.koper_data: report separately; never pool for riverine selection
